name: Oriental Beef and Pea Pods
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and cut green pepper into small strips.
2. Cut steak to tenderloin tip or round, then into paper-thin slices.
3. Break cauliflower into florets; slice each into 1/4-inch pieces.
4. Combine cauliflower, green pepper, beef, and onion in a 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Drizzle with soy sauce; stir lightly to coat evenly.
6. Cover and microwave on high (100%) for 6 minutes; stir.
7. Continue covering and microwave until meat is no longer pink, about 3 to 5 minutes.
8. Add frozen pea pods and cover; microwave until thawed, about 2 to 3 minutes.
9. In a separate glass measure, mix water, cornstarch, instant beef bouillon, and sugar.
10. Stir in juices from the meat.
11. Microwave uncovered on high (100%) for 2 1/2 minutes.
12. Once boiling, microwave an additional 2 to 3 minutes.
13. Stir the sauce into the meat mixture.
14. Serve over hot rice.
